headerSubtitle.agenda: Manage and organize your veterinary consultations
headerSubtitle.perfil: Manage your personal information and preferences
headerSubtitle.clinicManagement: Manage information, clinical history, and treatments of patients.

currency.label: Currency
currency.switchTitleUsd: Showing US dollars. Click to view soles (1 USD = {rate} PEN)
currency.switchTitlePen: Showing soles at rate {rate}. Click to view US dollars

subscriptionPlan.description: Full clinical suite to manage patients, scheduling and records from one place.

appointments.title: Upcoming Appointments
appointments.emptyWeek: No appointments scheduled for this week.

emailNotifications.name: Email Notifications
emailNotifications.desc: Receive weekly summaries and critical alerts.

appointmentReminders.name: Appointment Reminders
appointmentReminders.desc: Receive a notice 1 hour before each consultation.

darkMode.name: Dark Mode
darkMode.desc: Switch the interface to a dark color scheme.

sidebar.avatarUploadError: Could not upload photo. Please try again.
sidebar.invalidAvatarType: Only PNG or JPEG images are allowed
sidebar.avatarTooLarge: Image must be smaller than 2 MB

agenda.title: Upcoming Appointments
agenda.empty: No scheduled appointments. Book one from Clients.

chat.pageDescription: Direct communication with owners: results, reminders and follow-up.
chat.emptyChatHint: Start the conversation with a template or a custom message.
chat.messagePlaceholder: Write a message for the client...
chat.noSelectionDescription: Select a client to view history or send medical results, reminders and follow-ups.

templates.labText: Lab results are ready. You can pick them up or check your email.
templates.vaccineText: Reminder: your pet has a vaccination scheduled this week.
templates.followUpText: How is your pet doing after the recent procedure? We are here if you need us.
templates.appointmentText: Reminder: you have an appointment tomorrow. We look forward to seeing you!

selectPatient.title: Select patient
selectPatient.description: Choose a patient to view their medical history.

medicalHistory.loadError: Could not load medical history. Please verify the patient exists.
medicalHistory.emptyTimeline: There are no records in this patient's medical history.

registerForm.title: Register New Patient
registerForm.subtitle: Complete the pet's information
registerForm.name: Pet Name
registerForm.allergiesPlaceholder: E.g.: Penicillin, NSAIDs... (leave empty if none)

updateForm.title: Update clinical data
updateForm.subtitle: Edit only the information that changes during follow-up
updateForm.readOnlyHint: Name, species and owner cannot be changed here. Clinical status updates when admitting or discharging from Hospitalization.
updateForm.ageHint: Update age based on the latest veterinary check.
updateForm.weightHint: Record the weight from the latest visit or consultation.
updateForm.validationError: Check age (≥ 0) and weight (> 0 kg) before saving.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete patient
deleteConfirm.message: Delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.warning: Patients with consultations, vaccines or hospitalization records cannot be deleted.
deleteConfirm.hasRecordsMessage: This patient has clinical records and cannot be deleted.

payment.title: Upfront payment
payment.subtitle: Ticket #{id}
payment.pending: Consultation registered. Payment is still pending.
payment.ticketError: Consultation registered, but the payment ticket could not be loaded

emptyState.title: No consultations found
emptyState.description: Adjust your search filters or register a new consultation.

registerForm.title: Register New Consultation
registerForm.subtitle: Complete the consultation details
registerForm.diagnosisPlaceholder: Describe the reason or initial diagnosis

vaccines.title: Vaccines
vaccines.emptyList: No vaccine records yet. Use «Register Vaccine» or restart the backend to load sample data.

applyForm.title: Record vaccine application
applyForm.subtitle: Confirm application date and next dose schedule
applyForm.errorMessage: Complete application and next dose dates

hospitalization.title: Hospitalized Patients
hospitalization.description: Management and monitoring of hospitalized patients
hospitalization.loadError: Could not load hospitalization. Make sure the server is running.
hospitalization.empty: No hospitalized patients. Register an admission or restart the backend to load sample data.
hospitalization.dischargeConfirm: Discharge {name}? They will be removed from the hospitalized list.

dailyTracking.title: Daily Tracking
dailyTracking.emptyHint: Complete a task or log a clinical observation
dailyTracking.addError: Select a patient and enter observations

addModal.title: Log tracking entry
addModal.subtitle: Document the clinical progress of the hospitalized patient
addModal.notesPlaceholder: E.g. Temperature 38.5°C, tolerates diet, stable HR...

pendingTasks.title: Today's Tasks
pendingTasks.addScheduledSuccess: Task scheduled for {date}. It will appear on that day.
pendingTasks.emptyToday: No tasks scheduled for today in this category

addModal.title: New hospitalization task
addModal.subtitle: Schedule a follow-up activity for the clinical team
addModal.futureDateNote: This task will not appear in the list until the selected date.

statusHints.critico: Critical patients or procedures requiring attention within 1 hour.
statusHints.urgente: Tasks that must be resolved the same day (lab results, admissions).
statusHints.en_espera: Tasks that can be postponed or depend on a third-party response.
statusHints.en_proceso: Started tasks requiring follow-up (e.g. pending interconsultation).

edit.title: Edit admission
edit.subtitle: Update the patient's diagnosis, treatment, and status

discharge.title: Confirm discharge

register.title: Register Admission
register.subtitle: Select the patient and reason for hospital admission

emptyState.title: No clients found

registerForm.title: Register New Client
registerForm.subtitle: Complete personal and contact information
registerForm.statusAutoHint: New clients are registered as Active. They become Inactive automatically if they do not visit the clinic for more than 12 months.

prescriptions.description: Generate and manage medical prescriptions linked to veterinary consultations.
prescriptions.search: Search by patient, owner or ID...

registerForm.subtitle: Fill in the patient details and prescribed medications
